performance.notes: Good performance with optimized fonts and dynamic imports

accessibility.notes: Excellent accessibility - all images have alt text, forms have labels

seo.notes: Excellent SEO - comprehensive meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter cards, structured data

bestPractices.notes: Follows best practices - secure external links, proper form validation

largestChunks.note: Main app bundle - contains Framer Motion and page components
Secondary bundle - likely API data and utilities

strengths: Dynamic imports used for MobileShell, BlogSection, TestimonialsSection
Font display: swap prevents FOIT
Preconnect to external domains (avatars.githubusercontent.com)
Images use Next.js Image component with priority loading
Fonts served in optimized woff2 format

issues.description: Two large JS chunks (956K + 836K) may impact initial load on slow connections
issues.recommendation: Consider code-splitting further or lazy-loading non-critical components
issues.impact: Low - dynamic imports already mitigate this

strengths: All images have descriptive alt text (profile.name)
Form inputs have associated labels with htmlFor
Semantic HTML structure (section, h1, h2, h3)
Focus states styled via Tailwind
Color contrast acceptable for dark theme

issues.description: No explicit ARIA landmarks (role=main, role=nav) - using semantic HTML instead
issues.recommendation: Optional: Add role attributes for older screen readers

formAccessibility.required: Required fields marked with aria-required implicitly via HTML5

strengths: Comprehensive meta tags in layout.tsx
Open Graph tags (title, description, image, url, siteName)
Twitter Card tags (summary_large_image)
Canonical URL set
Robots meta configured (index, follow)
Sitemap.xml generated with proper priorities
Structured data (JSON-LD) for Person, WebSite, ProfessionalService
Keywords meta tag with relevant terms
All external links use rel="noopener noreferrer"
Buttons have explicit type attributes
Form inputs have proper type attributes (email, text)
HTTPS URLs used throughout
Static export (no server-side vulnerabilities)

issues.description: Cannot verify console errors without browser automation

recommendations.description: Monitor Core Web Vitals in production
recommendations.action: Set up Real User Monitoring (RUM) for LCP, FID, CLS
Add Skip to content for keyboard users
Optional: Add BreadcrumbList schema for better SERP display
